job_title: QA Engineer — AI & Automation Data Analyst
job_nlp_title: QA Engineer — AI & Automation Data Analyst
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: AI/ML tools, Python, JavaScript, Testing frameworks, CI/CD pipelines
skill_match_scores: AI/ML tools:1.0, Python:1.0, JavaScript:0.5, Testing frameworks:1.0, CI/CD pipelines:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, UI/UX Design, Software Engineering, or related field (graduated within last 2 years), Demonstrated interest in AI/ML tools — personal projects, coursework, or self-directed learning, Basic programming skills (Python, JavaScript, or similar), Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail, Excellent written and verbal communication skills, Self-starter mentality — comfortable working independently in a remote environment
preferred_quals: Experience with testing frameworks (Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, Appium), Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and version control (Git), Experience with mobile app testing (Android preferred), Knowledge of prompt engineering or AI-assisted development tools, Portfolio or projects demonstrating creative problem-solving
core_responsibilities: Design and execute manual test plans for new features across the Rewarded Play platform (mobile Android app, soon coming iOS app, web tools, backend services), Research, evaluate, and implement AI-powered testing tools and frameworks to automate repetitive QA workflows, Build and maintain automated test suites that reduce manual testing time and increase coverage, Develop and document QA processes, test cases, and quality standards for the team, Collaborate with product and engineering to identify high-risk areas and prioritize testing efforts, Track, report, and triage bugs with clear reproduction steps and severity assessments, Continuously explore emerging AI tools (LLMs, visual testing AI, codegen tools) to improve QA efficiency, Measure and report on QA metrics: test coverage, defect escape rate, automation percentage, time-to-release, Participate in sprint planning, feature reviews, and release processes
job_summary: Influence Mobile is the company behind Rewarded Play, a top rewarded gaming app with over 20 million users. They are seeking a motivated recent college graduate to build and improve AI-driven QA processes while handling manual testing for new features.
